mapper.sql: id, plan_id, record_code, daily_check_id, check_name, check_date, check_type, checker_id, checker_name, template_id, template_name, template_snapshot, total_classes, total_deduction_count, total_deduction_score, avg_score, max_score, min_score, status, publish_time, archive_time, total_appeal_count, appeal_pending_count, appeal_approved_count, appeal_rejected_count, snapshot_version, snapshot_created_at, last_recalc_at, recalc_reason, description, remarks, created_by, created_at, updated_at, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM check_records_new WHERE daily_check_id = #{dailyCheckId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM check_records_new WHERE check_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY check_date DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE check_records_new r SET total_appeal_count = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM check_record_appeals_new a WHERE a.record_id = r.id ), appeal_pending_count = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM check_record_appeals_new a WHERE a.record_id = r.id AND a.status IN (0, 1) ), appeal_approved_count = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM check_record_appeals_new a WHERE a.record_id = r.id AND a.status = 2 ), appeal_rejected_count = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM check_record_appeals_new a WHERE a.record_id = r.id AND a.status = 3 ), updated_at = NOW() WHERE r.id = #{recordId}

UPDATE check_records_new r SET total_deduction_count = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM check_record_deductions_new d WHERE d.record_id = r.id ), total_deduction_score = ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(d.actual_score), 0) FROM check_record_deductions_new d WHERE d.record_id = r.id ), avg_score = ( SELECT COALESCE(AVG(cs.total_score), 0) FROM check_record_class_stats_new cs WHERE cs.record_id = r.id ), max_score = ( SELECT COALESCE(MAX(cs.total_score), 0) FROM check_record_class_stats_new cs WHERE cs.record_id = r.id ), min_score = ( SELECT COALESCE(MIN(cs.total_score), 0) FROM check_record_class_stats_new cs WHERE cs.record_id = r.id ), last_recalc_at = NOW(), snapshot_version = snapshot_version + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE r.id = #{recordId}
mapper.select: SELECT CONCAT('CR', DATE_FORMAT(#{checkDate}, '%Y%m%d'), LPAD(COALESCE( (SELECT MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(record_code, 11) AS UNSIGNED)) + 1 FROM check_records_new WHERE record_code LIKE CONCAT('CR', DATE_FORMAT(#{checkDate}, '%Y%m%d'), '%')), 1 ), 3, '0'))
